name: eleven-rings-the-soul-of-success
description: Phil Jackson's Eleven Rings: The Soul of Success — a leadership and team-building toolkit from the most successful coach in NBA history, blending Zen mindfulness, the triangle offense, and managing superstar egos to build championship cultures winning 11 titles across two dynasties.
useCase: Learn how to build championship teams — manage superstar egos, create trust-based culture, use mindfulness as competitive advantage, and know when to lead and when to get out of the way.
knownRisks: Jackson's Zen approach may not translate to all industries or cultures
His success is intertwined with having all-time great players — replicable but not guaranteed
The triangle offense is basketball-specific; the leadership principles are broader
